audit_scores.reasoning: Excellent specificity with precise file:line citations and technical details. High accuracy in identifying real bugs like undefined variables and NaN handling. Missing critical dimensions like security, cross-platform compatibility, and data leakage analysis.

findings.description: compare_core_methods.m:308 — undefined variable n_tp (should be nTp), crashes bootstrap CI computation
detect_motion_artifacts.m:89 — NaN NMI comparison silently passes, motion artifacts not flagged for low-voxel volumes
shared.py:386,435 — regex span deduplication misses overlapping matches
fit_models.m:195 — b-value validation after IVIM fitting instead of at function entry
load_dwi_data.m:380 — warns on empty T_Pat_normalized but continues, causing silent patient matching failure
generate_report.py:152-161 — bare except Exception silently consumes CSV/log parsing errors
compute_summary_metrics.m:335-614 — redundant GTV mask loading in triple-nested loop, only last mask cached
compare_core_methods.m, metrics_dosimetry.m — duplicate warning suppression blocks
fit_models.m — GPU memory estimation optimistic but has safe fallback
load_dwi_data.m — patient ID normalization duplicated with metrics_baseline

audit_scores.reasoning: Good specificity with file:line citations and concrete technical details. Most findings are accurate though some statistical concerns may be overstated. Solid domain awareness respecting medical-physics constraints.

findings.description: test_convert_dicom.m:45,84,115,155 — unescaped paths in system() chmod calls
compute_schoenfeld_residuals.m:181-209 — LOWESS smoother fallback incorrect, no rcond check, degenerate case not handled
compute_ipcw_weights.m:77-91 — risk-set boundary handling at t_start==t_u lacks clarity
build_td_panel.m:256-282 — NaN baseline decay imputation falls back to LOCF without documentation
scale_td_panel.m:85-86 — baseline scaling path lacks omitnan, inconsistent with fallback
batch_graph_analysis.py:1476 — worker catches all exceptions including CancelledError
compute_summary_metrics.m:334-336 — GTV mask loading only caches last mask, redundant I/O
compare_core_methods.m and metrics_dosimetry.m — duplicate warning suppression blocks
compute_schoenfeld_residuals.m — no dedicated unit tests for LOWESS or residuals
Multiple utils — 9+ utility functions lack dedicated unit test files

audit_scores.reasoning: Well-calibrated importance scores and accurate technical findings, but lacks broader coverage of performance, security, and cross-platform concerns expected for a comprehensive audit.

findings.description: compare_core_methods.m, metrics_dosimetry.m — duplicate warning suppression extracted to suppress_core_warnings.m
scale_td_panel.m:85-86 — baseline scaling path lacked omitnan, now consistent
build_td_panel.m:279 — NaN propagation in decay imputation documented
compute_ipcw_weights.m:77-91 — risk-set boundary handling is correct, purely documentation nit
compute_schoenfeld_residuals.m — no dedicated unit test file, but integration-covered and LOWESS hardened
Multiple utils without dedicated tests — integration-level coverage sufficient
batch_graph_analysis.py dual-provider rate limiter isolation — workers run sequentially, no runtime hazard

audit_scores.reasoning: High-quality final audit with specific file citations, technically correct assessments, comprehensive coverage of remaining areas, and well-calibrated low importance scores for minor issues.

findings.description: compute_ipcw_weights.m:77-91 — risk-set boundary documentation, functionally correct
Multiple utils without dedicated test files — integration coverage sufficient
batch_graph_analysis.py dual-provider rate limiter — no runtime hazard, sequential execution
Minor variable naming inconsistencies across files — no functional impact
